name: plugin install registers each rule under the namespaced id form plugin-id-slash-rule-id
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example && printf 'name: example
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: x
  - id: bar
    detector: y
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --registry-out registry.txt 2>err.txt && grep -qE '^example/foo$' registry.txt && grep -qE '^example/bar$' registry.txt && echo ok 1>&2
